ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apparel_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size designation (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "height_range" TEXT /* Height range corresponding to the size */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Weight range corresponding to the size */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the apparel in centimeters */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type (e.g., Slim, Regular, Loose) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the apparel size */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location or store */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stock available for this size at the location */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the apparel style */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the inventory record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES apparel_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES apparel_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the store or location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the store */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., Retail, Outlet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "primary_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for transactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apparel_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apparel style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style (e.g., T-shirt, Jacket) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of this style */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category (e.g., Casual, Formal) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_styles_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the apparel size sold */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sale occurred */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size sold in this record */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the apparel style */,
  "return_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of returns */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES apparel_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES apparel_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Manager, Staff) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale record */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
